channel.title: Latest from TechRadar
channel.description: All the latest content from the TechRadar team

item.title: Could this be the key to eternal storage? Experts claim new DNA HDD can be ‘erased and overwritten repeatedly’
item.description: DNA-based storage could provide long-term alternatives to cloud storage and HDDs, but practical devices remain years away from reality.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen

media:content.media:description: scientist holding microchip and checking electronic circuit
media:content.media:text: scientist holding microchip and checking electronic circuit
media:content.media:title: scientist holding microchip and checking electronic circuit

item.title: 12 of the best sleep-hacking gadgets to help you get the best rest of your life — by a former Sleep Editor
item.description: It's Sleep Awareness Week, and that's a good a time as any to sort out your slumber.
item.dc:creator: Ruth Hamilton

media:content.media:description: Loop earplugs, a Philips Hue wake-up light and a smart ring

item.title: Is that a Mac mini in disguise? No, but the new Satechi CubeDock packs in everything you'd want in a mini PC — and for much less
item.description: The Satechi CubeDock supports multiple displays, fast NVMe drives, and various devices while streamlining workspace setup in a single aluminum enclosure.

item.title: 'Nothing has actually changed': Valve recommits to a 2026 launch for the Steam Machine amid rumors of a further delay
item.description: A blog post from Valve itself sparked concerns that the Steam Machine would be pushed back to 2027.
item.dc:creator: David Nield

media:content.media:description: We still don't know exactly when the Steam Machine will appear
media:content.media:text: Render of Steam Machine
media:content.media:title: Render of Steam Machine

item.title: Starlink says V2 satellites will provide ‘5G speeds from space with 100x the data density’ - so get ready for a mobile speed overhaul
item.description: Starlink V2 satellites aim to deliver 5G speeds from space, dramatically increasing data density and supporting hundreds of LTE phones.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen

media:content.media:description: Starlink V2 Satellites
media:content.media:text: Starlink V2 Satellites
media:content.media:title: Starlink V2 Satellites

item.title: I spent a month with the Razer Enki Pro gaming chair, and my butt will eternally thank me
item.description: The Razer Enki Pro gaming chair is a premium gaming chair which is very comfortable, but it will set you back a pretty penny and lacks style.

item.title: I almost walked away with a new iPad until Apple unveiled the MacBook Neo — these are 5 reasons why I think the Neo is the better option

item.title: 'Initially we were concerned, but I think it's helpful': new Pixar movie Hoppers is 'nothing like' Zootopia 2 — but could be just as successful
item.description: Before Hoppers came along, wildly successful Zootopia 2 introduced a brand-new beaver — but the overlap has 'never worried' director Daniel Chong.

item.title: ChatGPT has delayed the roll out of its adult mode again: 'Getting the experience right will take more time'

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch T20 World Cup Final 2026 for free
item.description: We've found a sneaky way you can watch the T20 World Cup Final 2026 from anywhere in the world, as defending champions India take on New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Back

item.title: ‘I'm a huge music fan and I love the idea, but it’s not on the horizon’ — Samsung exec confirms Milk Music won’t be revived any time soon, and I think that’s a big mistake
item.description: Why Samsung’s defunct Milk Music was the Betamax to Apple Music’s VHS – and why I think it’s high time Samsung rebuilt its music streaming platform
item.author: becky.scarrott@futurenet.com (Becky Scarrott)
item.dc:creator: Becky Scarrott

item.title: 'Get enough of these and you could probably throw your own rave' — the 3 best smart light bulbs, recommended by a home tech editor

item.title: God of War Sons of Sparta review: This series' metroidvania prequel is serviceable, but shines like a red orb on PlayStation Portal
item.description: God of War Sons of Sparta represents a significant departure for the iconic action series, one that can sometimes feel unimpressive on a big screen. But the game's layered metroidvania structure, deep combat, and excellent prequel story and characters all come into satisfying focus when played on the PlayStation Portal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Cabral

media:content.media:description: God of War: Sons of Sparta screenshot showing young Kratos on a plateau of statues
media:content.media:text: God of War: Sons of Sparta screenshot showing young Kratos on a plateau of statues
media:content.media:title: God of War: Sons of Sparta screenshot showing young Kratos on a plateau of statues

item.title: 'What begins as a phone call from 'IT support' ends with a fully instrumented network compromise': This fake tech support scam tricks employees into infecting their own company devices
item.description: Attackers deliberately crash browsers, impersonate IT staff, and convince employees to install malicious tools that deploy Havoc malware across corporate systems.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen

item.title: ‘Our world is full of these wild ghosts’: Werner Herzog’s new National Geographic documentary gives a rare glimpse of some of the world's most elusive animals
item.description: Werner Herzog’s new National Geographic documentary follows a decade-long search for Africa’s elusive ghost elephants — here's what the film's star said about the experience.
item.author: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke)
item.dc:creator: Amelia Schwanke

media:content.media:description: Ghost Elephants is a new National Geographic documentary premiering on March 7.
media:content.media:text: Steve Boyes looks at a rainbow in National Geographic's Ghost Elephants
media:content.media:title: Steve Boyes looks at a rainbow in National Geographic's Ghost Elephants

item.title: Our first Google Pixel 11 design leak may have revealed a change coming to the iconic camera bar
item.description: We're counting down to the launch of the Pixel 11 phones later this year, and the camera bar may get a redesign.
item.dc:creator: David Nield

media:content.media:description: The Pixel 10 Pro XL, with camera bar
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in Porcelain against a blue background with a green neon Android figurine in the background
